default_variant.heading: Default variant
default_variant.description: Choose the variant that should be used as the default for this product (e.g. for your storefront).

variant_thickness.heading: Thickness
variant_thickness.description: Set this variant's material thickness in millimeters (stored as metadata.thickness).
variant_thickness.label: Thickness (mm)
variant_thickness.invalid: Please enter a valid, non-negative number.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password – your verification code
password_reset.text:
Hello,

We have received a request to reset your password for your account ({email}).

Please click on the following link to set a new password:
{reset_url}

If you did not want to reset your password, you can ignore this email.

Best regards
{from_name}

production_status_update.subject: Your order {reference}: {status_label}

order_confirmation.subject: Order confirmation – Order {reference}

bank_settings.bank_info: These bank details will be displayed on the order confirmation email.

customer_gpe.heading: GPE customer
customer_gpe.description: Links this shop customer to an existing GPE customer. First enter the GPE customer ID and check it to confirm the right customer, then save. The ID controls the customer discount and, later, order transmission to GPE.
customer_gpe.label: GPE customer ID
customer_gpe.check_not_found: No GPE customer found for this ID (or GPE unreachable).
customer_gpe.save_failed: GPE customer ID could not be saved.
